mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.name, g.remark, g.system_builtin AS systemBuiltin, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account a WHERE a.account_group_id = g.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL) AS accountCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account a LEFT JOIN account_state s ON s.account_id = a.id AND s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id WHERE a.account_group_id = g.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.login_state = 1) AS onlineCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account a LEFT JOIN account_state s ON s.account_id = a.id AND s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id WHERE a.account_group_id = g.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.risk_status > 1) AS riskCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account a LEFT JOIN account_state s ON s.account_id = a.id AND s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id WHERE a.account_group_id = g.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.account_state = 3) AS bannedCount, g.created_at AS createdAt, g.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM account_group g WHERE ORDER BY g.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM account_group WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM account_group WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM account_group WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM account_group WHERE system_builtin = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_group (name, remark, system_builtin, created_at, updated_at, created_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{remark}, #{systemBuiltin}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE account_group SET deleted_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account WHERE account_group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
